# Rishi Banerjee

> TA leader who builds systems. Director of Talent Acquisition at Atlan.

Rishi Banerjee owns Global R&D Talent Strategy and Acquisition at Atlan (Engineering, Product, Design, IT, Security). 20+ years building and scaling TA functions across APAC, North America, and Europe. Author of Raising the Bar. Builds production tools with AI as engineering partner.

## Projects
- Prompt Control Plane: Deterministic prompt governance for production LLM systems (https://prompt-control-plane.pages.dev/)
- Claude Usage Widget: Native macOS menubar widget for Claude API usage tracking
- RishiOS MCP: Talent evaluation MCP server with rubric-based scoring
- Atlan Offer Wizard: AI-generated personalized offer pages
- BlinkyOwl: Autonomous YouTube Shorts generator with self-learning
